Resource Map

Start with your age and state, then explore options that fit your situation. Use the map and list together for faster screening.

Resources on Map

Outpatient Therapies

ABA, speech, OT, hippotherapy, music therapy, and social skills programs.

Therapeutic Full-Time Schools

Specialized schools for students on the autism spectrum.

Day Programs (Adults)

Vocational, social, and life skills training for adults.

Residential Programs (Adults)

Group homes, supported living, and residential communities.

Social & Activity Clubs

Autism-focused programs, recreation, and parent support.

Psychiatrists

Autism-experienced psychiatrists.

Developmental Pediatricians

Specialists in autism diagnosis.

Neurologists

Pediatric and adult neurologists with autism expertise.

Upcoming Events

Conferences, workshops, and community events.

Government Programs & Benefits

Medicaid waivers, ABLE accounts, guardianship, special needs trusts, respite care, housing, Arc chapters, and more for all 50 states.
